offer: For Etsy sellers processing 10-50 products/month, low stock levels cause missed sales opportunities. We provide low stock alerts instead of manual inventory tracking via spreadsheets.
problem: Inability to track low stock levels effectively
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Indie Hackers discussions on inventory management
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Forums where Etsy sellers share tools
try_it: Let users try low stock alerts on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Make a short demo video showcasing the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing inventory data
